project_type: Single-page HR/Legal web app (vanilla JS + Firebase/Firestore)
build_system: None - static files deployed directly to Netlify
build_command: N/A - static site, just validate JS syntax with node --check
test_command: node --check modules.js && node --check core.js && node --check absensi-ijef.js
verification_instructions: Run node --check on all JS files to verify no syntax errors. Visually inspect integration logic.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - static files. node is available for syntax checking.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no npm install possible. All code must be vanilla JS with Firebase SDK loaded from CDN in index.html. No external dependencies can be added.
contribution_requirements: Code follows existing patterns: single-file modules with functions for rendering, modal forms, and Firestore CRUD. HTML is generated as template strings inline. All UI in Indonesian language.
key_patterns: 1) Firestore collections prefixed with 'hrd_'. 2) currentUser object has: id, nama, role, departemen, posisi, nip, linkedKaryawan, profilePic. 3) Grade is stored as 'gradeJabatan' on hrd_karyawan docs (values like BOD/HEAD/SENIOR HEAD/STAFF). 4) SPPD integration already creates hrd_dinas_luar record on submit. 5) Portal views filter by currentUser.id or name. 6) renderPeraturanHTML() displays static company rules. 7) ROLES object: admin:6, bod:5, head:4, manager:3, leader:2, staff:1.
relevant_files: modules.js (lines 4188-4735: Perjalanan Dinas module, SPPD form, uang muka, laporan, reimbursement)
directory_structure: Flat structure: index.html, core.js (routing/auth), modules.js (all HR modules), absensi-ijef.js (attendance module), recruitment.js, disc-test.html/js, sw.js, manifest.json, netlify.toml
